title: Oranges!
description: Oranges have been added to Minecraft!
body:
![Oranges are here!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/814f7bf2430a30acfc0d7f6ed033b96ffc7b26f9.png)

Ever wanted **ORANGES** in your game? Well now you can with this mod!

**This mod includes:**
- Oranges _(duh)_
- Orange Seeds
- Orange Juice _(good for you)_
- Leaves with Oranges

# Here is everything you need to know for this mod:
- **To obtain oranges** you'll need to put an apple and orange dye in the crafting slots. Once that is done you will have successfully obtained **YOUR FIRST ORANGE!**
- Once you have that, you can eat it, or turn it into **Orange Seeds!**
- If you have orange seeds, place them on farmland and obtain more oranges that way _(yes, I know oranges come from trees, but I couldn't get them to generate in them)_
- All you need now is two oranges and a glass bottle to craft **Orange Juice!** Orange Juice is good for your health, good enough to where you **regenerate 1 heart if consumed!**
- **"What about leaves with oranges?"** Well, I couldn't get them to generate naturally just yet, but you can craft them by simply adding any leaf block and an orange.

Thats everything, at least any worth noting.

**PLEASE REPORT ANY BUGS FOUND EITHER IN THE COMMENTS OR GITHUB REPOSITORY!**
